note: Decidability contract for the validation protocol. Frozen ex ante — never adjusted to match observed data.

verdict_rule.description: If min_total_decidable is not reached across C1+C2+C3, verdict = INDETERMINATE (not REJECT). Otherwise verdict is determined by C1/C2/C3 condition gates.

rationale.min_decidable_per_condition: 6 (not 3) — with 3, a single flipped run can change the verdict. 6 provides a robust majority.
rationale.max_indeterminate_rate_per_condition: 0.40 — above 40% indeterminate, the condition is unreliable and should not produce ACCEPT/REJECT.
rationale.min_total_decidable: 18 = 3 conditions × 6 — ensures all three conditions have adequate decidable runs.
rationale.window_set: 2 small, 2 medium, 3 large — contractual coverage of scale sensitivity, not hand-picked.
